children.name: Should be able to login to VPN via website
Should be able to login to VPN via website

expect(received).toContain(expected) // indexOf

Received string:    "https://accounts.firefox.com/subscriptions/products/prod_FvnsFHIfezy3ZI?plan=price_1Iw85dJNcmPzuWtRyhMDdtM7&entrypoint=www.mozilla.org-vpn-product-page&form_type=button&service=e6eb0d1e856335fc&utm_source=www.mozilla.org-vpn-product-page&utm_medium=referral&utm_campaign=vpn-product-page&data_cta_position=pricing&device_id=2e45fc4aacf44868950469d1c2634ed6&flow_begin_time=1651538934667&flow_id=e6507504c3b6c6554bf0c5d69e74156f42f7485c7591ef9face285857fde3815"
